breakdown: This PR fixes streaming passthrough normalization to handle LLM-generated rewards_box payloads with non-standard keys ('xp' instead of 'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces' instead of 'gold'). The fix adds a normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() function that falls back to legacy keys and removes them after extraction. Test coverage is excellent with a real E2E test that triggers the specific LLM behavior. Main gaps are missing type hints on function parameters and lack of docstring on the new public function.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() function in world_logic.py with fallback logic for legacy keys
Apply normalization in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair() before persisting rewards
Add new test file test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py with E2E test using real LLM
Remove legacy keys (xp, gold_pieces) from normalized output after extraction
Use copy.deepcopy() to avoid mutating original rewards_box
